BA BOT - Big Ambitions automation mod
=====================================

In this folder you have TWO things to run:

   *  Install BA BOT            <- the only thing you click
   *  MelonLoader Installer.exe <- MelonLoader (the installer above can open this for you)

----------------------------------------------------------------
INSTALL (about a minute)
----------------------------------------------------------------
  1. Double-click  "Install BA BOT".
       A small window opens and finds your game automatically.

  2. If it says MelonLoader is missing, click  "1 - Install MelonLoader".
       That opens the bundled MelonLoader installer - pick Big Ambitions,
       click INSTALL, then launch the game once and quit.
       (Windows 11: if asked, turn OFF Smart App Control or the mod is blocked.)

  3. Back in the BA BOT window, click  "2 - Install BA BOT".

  4. Launch Big Ambitions and press  F8  in-game to open the BA BOT panel.

That's it. Everything you need is in this zip - nothing else to download.

----------------------------------------------------------------
TO REMOVE
----------------------------------------------------------------
  Open the  files  folder and double-click  uninstall.bat
  (Your settings are kept, outside the save file. Saves stay vanilla-clean.)

----------------------------------------------------------------
WHAT IT DOES
----------------------------------------------------------------
  An in-game control panel (F8): live cash / day / net-worth, quick actions
  (+$1,000, Energy 100%), Time-skip (AFK), Auto-wellbeing, and safety-gated
  automation for finance (auto-pay taxes), employees, logistics and restock.
  Default-OFF; money moves PREVIEW until you turn on Live mode. English & Dansk.

Single-player only. Back up your saves. Press F8 in-game.
Source + updates: https://github.com/ItsRealDennis/BigAmbitionsAutomation
